embed.title: Embed script
embed.hint: Add this script tag to your site layout to load the Mesh embed helper.

connectorGuide.title: Developer integration guide (Markdown)
connectorGuide.description: Full handoff document for your website developer — CORS, env vars, API routes, and field reference.
connectorGuide.hint: Copy and save as INTEGRATION.md in your client website repo.

integration.title: Website integration
integration.description: Connect your landing site to read published business data via the public API.
integration.howItWorks: Publish content in Mesh, register your site origins for CORS, then call the public snapshot API from your frontend.
integration.corsIntro: Browsers block cross-origin requests unless each origin is registered on your business profile.
integration.noOrigins: No CORS origins configured yet. Add them on your business profile.
integration.devIntro: During local development, proxy API requests through your dev server to avoid CORS.

steps.publish: Publish your latest content from this page so the public snapshot reflects your changes.
steps.cors: Add every browser origin (production + local dev ports) under Business profile → Website domains (CORS).
steps.env: Set VITE_CRM_API_BASE_URL and VITE_CRM_TENANT_SLUG (or Next.js equivalents) in your client site.
steps.routes: Use only public routes: snapshot, availability, and bookings — no Authorization header.
steps.verify: Verify with curl or open the live snapshot link; fix CORS if the browser blocks fetch.

endpoints.snapshot: Full published business snapshot (products, locations, profile, etc.)
endpoints.availability: Booking availability for a given date

corsBlocked.fix: Add the exact origin (including port) to Website domains on the business profile.

curlWorks.symptom: curl works but browser fetch fails
curlWorks.fix: Almost always CORS — register the page origin, not the API URL.

unauthorized.fix: Remove Authorization headers; public routes must be unauthenticated.

booking403.fix: Ensure bookings are enabled in business settings and the payload matches API requirements.

notFound.fix: Check tenant slug, publish at least once, and confirm the API base URL ends with /api/v1.

connect.title: Website connect
connect.subtitle: CORS, public API, embed script, and Markdown guide for your landing site.
connect.noSlugDescription: Your workspace needs a tenant slug before you can connect a website. Contact support if this persists.
connect.overviewDescription: After publishing, your site reads data from the gateway snapshot API. Register CORS origins on the business profile first.
